answerExplanation.description: A step-by-step or full explanation about Answer. Can outline how this Answer was achieved or contain more broad clarification or statement about it.

parentItem.description: The parent of a question, answer or item in general. Typically used for Q/A discussion threads e.g. a chain of comments with the first comment being an [[Article]] or other [[CreativeWork]]. See also [[comment]] which points from something to a comment about it.

description: An answer offered to a question; perhaps correct, perhaps opinionated or wrong.
title: Answer
